front.title: Post-Quantum Key Encapsulation Mechanisms (PQ KEMs) for JOSE and COSE

abstract.t:
This document describes the conventions for using Post-Quantum Key Encapsulation Mechanisms (PQ-KEMs) within JOSE and COSE.
About This Document
This note is to be removed before publishing as an RFC.
Status information for this document may be found at https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/draft-reddy-cose-jose-pqc/.
Discussion of this document takes place on the cose Working Group mailing list (mailto:cose@ietf.org), which is archived at https://mailarchive.ietf.org/arch/browse/cose/. Subscribe at https://www.ietf.org/mailman/listinfo/cose/.
